arguments: The end can be the beginning
but struggle will come to an end.
Not everything is what it seems
Trust your senses, but keep them sharp
so you can see through the illusion.
Find who cast shade on you.
Don\'t let your emotions cloud what\'s important
but don\'t let it cloud your judgement.
The air tightens around your thoughts
Silence grows where truth should speak
In stillness you find what words cannot say
The light trembles on the edge
You sink beneath what once was light
The beat reminds you you\'re alive
The mirror shows what you deny
What you see is what you can change
until the face becomes a stranger.
The shadow moves before you do
What hides in dark still follows light
and it reveals what you refused to see.
The veil falls between knowing and seeing
The veil softens what truth cannot bear
The anchor drags beneath your calm
Hold steady where the storm begins
The whisper tells what you shouldn\'t hear
A gentle voice speaks beneath thought
